description: Router-V2 W1 — the route-decide lexicon as a versioned DATA artifact (lifted verbatim from route-decide.js KEYWORDS + SUBSTRATE_META_TOKENS at weights_version v1.3-dict-expanded-2026-06-12). LOAD-BEARING: token sets are architect-gated (see route-decide.js header + architect_gate below); a change to any token set requires a new architect pass + a lexicon_version bump. The scorer schema-validates this file at the A4 boundary and FAILS CLOSED (throws / exits non-zero, never a fabricated verdict) on a malformed/version-mismatched artifact.
architect_gate: Weights, thresholds, keyword sets, and edge-case behavior are LOAD-BEARING per theo's H.7.3 design. Adjustments to keyword sets require a new architect pass (route-decide.js:11-13). Keywords-first; weights stay hardcoded in route-decide.js.

provenance.stakes: M-1 expanded stakes + R3 (kubernetes/k8s/terraform/helm) + H.7.11 (ari): severity-class (critical/severity), concurrency-failure-class (race-condition/deadlock/*leak), security-class (breach/vulnerability/cve/exploit). Closes drift-note 4.
provenance.domain_novelty: M-2 textual signals only — NO substrate lookup.
provenance.compound_strong: C-2 strong compound + H.7.11 concurrency + complex-systems clusters + drift:dictionary-gap (2026-06-03) high-precision v3.2 substrate phrases + drift:dictionary-gap v3.8a (2026-06-12, MANDATED architect pass) zero-FP v3.3-v3.8 Lab/trust vocabulary. Flat 0.15 contribution however many match.
provenance.compound_weak: C-2 weak compound (only fires if stakes does NOT) + H.7.11 architectural/refactor cluster. refactor is ambiguous; mitigated by compound_weak suppression-by-stakes.
provenance.audit_binary: C-1 high-precision only (removed 'review') + H.7.11 postmortem/root-cause clusters + phrase-level (review pass/audit pass). Second-highest weight share (0.20).
provenance.scope_size: Multi-file / multi-component signals + R3 manifest + R1 plural-noun-API (endpoints/apis) + H.7.11 substrate-file-type plurals (hooks/scripts) + callsite(s).
provenance.convergence_value: Non-obvious-tradeoff signals; R4 additions. H.7.11: no additions (drift-notes are known-design execution, not convergence-needing).
provenance.user_facing_or_ux: R2 7th dimension (user-facing / UX / docs). H.7.11: no additions.
provenance.counter_signals: HIGH-1 BACKLOG-class counter-signals + H.7.11 polish-class (polish/jsdoc/docstring/frontmatter/lint/...). 'rename' borderline; drop first if FP.
provenance.infra_terms: HIGH-3 infra-implicit-stakes (independent of stakes match); R3 raised the lift 0.20->0.30.
provenance.substrate_meta: H.7.16 (drift-note 9, mira) substrate-meta sentinel — DETECTION-ONLY (feeds [ROUTE-META-UNCERTAIN]; does NOT score). Tier 1 file/symbol refs + Tier 2/2b/2c substrate vocabulary. The high-precision multi-word subset ALSO scores in compound_strong (scored_and_detected_overlap) — detection is BROAD (advisory; FP cost = one extra advisory line), scoring is NARROW (zero-FP multi-word phrases). Bare E/K-codes rejected (match chess/vitamin/grid text). Note: weights_version + WEIGHTS_VERSION are an intentional dual-form (same lowercased token); both surface in substrate_meta_tokens for a single match -- verbatim pre-existing behavior, preserved by W1 (do not collapse without a behavior-change review).
